zh.Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾
zh.Barkway, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴可瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Grey於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾時，他的父親Richard de Grey30歲，母親Lucia de Humet29歲。他於1255年之前與Lucy Mohun在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年1月5日在蘇格蘭洛包爾享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾。

zh-hans.Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾
zh-hans.Barkway, Hertfordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀特福爾巴可瓦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Grey于大约1230年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾时，他的父亲Richard de Grey30岁，母亲Lucia de Humet29岁。他于1255年之前与Lucy Mohun在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年1月5日在苏格兰洛包爾享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Grey was born about 1230, in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Grey, was 30 and his mother, Lucia de Humet, was 29. He married Lucy Mohun before 1255, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 January 1272, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Grey est né environ 1230, à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Grey, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lucia de Humet, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Mohun avant 1255, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1272, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Grey um 1230 in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Grey 30 und seine Mutter Lucia de Humet 29. Er hat vor 1255 in England Lucy Mohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1272 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Roxburghshire, Scotland und wurde in Codnor, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Grey è nato il circa 1230 nel Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Grey, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lucia de Humet, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Mohun prima del 1255, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 gennaio 1272, nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Codnor, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Greyが約1230年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーで生まれた時，父Richard de Greyは30歳，母Lucia de Humetは29歳であった。1255年以前にイギリスでLucy Mohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年1月5日にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Grey(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Grey(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia de Humet(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1255년 이전 영국에서 Lucy Mohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 1월 5일 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 코드너에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Grey, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lucia de Humet, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Mohun antes 1255, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de janeiro de 1272, em Roxburghshire, Scotland, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Grey родился около 1230 г. в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Grey было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Humet, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Mohun перед 1255 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 января 1272 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Grey nació aproximadamente 1230, en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Grey, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lucia de Humet, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lucy Mohun antes de 1255, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de enero de 1272, en Roxburghshire, Scotland, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
